steps.t: Supervisor Beecher can be found at the Trestlespan. You should talk Supervisor Beecher.
Black powder bombs can be found on the Trestlespan. You should remove the unlit black powder bombs as soon as you are able.
Norwarden can be found in the Wildwood. You should plant some of the black powder bombs that you collected at Norwarden.
Norwarden can be found in the Wildwood. You should grab a torch and light the black powder bombs that you planted.
Marl's Crossing can be found in the Wildwood. You should plant some of the black powder bombs that you collected at Marl's Crossing.
Marl's Crossing can be found in the Wildwood. You should grab a torch and light the black powder bombs that you planted.
Aran Greenwith can be found at Trestlebridge. You should talk to Aran Greenwith.
Reconstruction work continues on Trestlebridge. You should survey the reconstruction of Trestlebridge.
Aran Greenwith can be found at Trestlebridge. You should talk to Aran Greenwith.
